rationale: Accepted exactly the two CP7-E Magic Weapon item-target rows. Both replay through public reducer entrypoints and match the copied WeaponEnhancementItemTargetRouteSubject qRoute: start battle, discover with empty holes owned by BattleItemTargetBoundaryOwner, then resolve without fill with empty holes owned by BattleActiveEffectOwner. MagicWeaponTargetItem remains component witness vocabulary only and was not added as a reducer-owned hole or fill.
